title: Document capability matrix and expand test coverage for Trello skill growth
body:
## Summary
The skill needs clearer product boundaries and broader tests before more feature work lands. Right now the supported surface is spread across scripts and docs, but there is no single capability matrix or growth plan encoded in the repo.

## Goal
Make the skill easier to extend safely by documenting supported/planned operations and expanding tests around the CLI contracts.

## Scope
- add a capability matrix covering supported, planned, and intentionally unsupported features
- document safety expectations for destructive or surprising operations
- document how ambiguity must be handled for boards/lists/cards and future members/labels
- add tests for script contracts, mutation request construction, and failure-mode messaging
- identify lightweight patterns for adding future scripts without duplicating too much flag parsing behavior

## Acceptance criteria
- repo docs clearly show current feature coverage and near-term roadmap
- tests go beyond core resolver behavior and cover representative scripts/actions
- safety rules are explicit for future destructive/admin features
- maintainability guidance exists for adding new Trello operations

## Notes
This is intentionally not an architecture rewrite. Keep the repo thin, script-first, and standard-library based.
